item.description:
WhisperFree v4.0

  • Apple Silicon only — Intel Macs stay on v3.3
  • Switched transcription to NVIDIA Parakeet TDT v2 on the Apple Neural Engine — ~3x faster and more accurate on clean speech
  • Custom Vocabulary now biases the decoder directly — rare names and jargon come through accurately
  • Removed the model picker and Contextual transcription toggle (Parakeet is the only engine)
  • First launch downloads ~820MB (Parakeet + CTC head
  • one-time)
